body:
With https://github.com/CliMA/Oceananigans.jl/pull/4074 we can do domains that cross the 0 in longitude, so we do not really need to restrict the bathymetry.

TODO: after merging the Oceananigans PR, show that we can do a Mediterranean simulation that includes Gibraltar strait.
title: Do not restrict bathymetry

body: tests are back up! This PR fixes some bugs accumulated during the period of no-testing
title: Some bufixes
